title: Short title
doc_html:
PART I-A.  PRISON INMATE TRAINING REFORM ACT

§731.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Prison Inmate Training Reform Act".

Acts 1994, 3rd Ex. Sess., No. 113, §1.
